description: Maximum stability: eliminates all low-density exposure, highest investigability
selection_rule: Select only candidates where min_density >= tau; random sample from eligible pool
rationale: Zero low-density exposure. Investigability is near-ceiling (0.989). The cost is novelty: only 25.3% of selected hypotheses are from structurally unusual (low-density) territory. Use when reproducibility and investigability floor matter most, and novel discovery is secondary.
use_when: High-confidence hypothesis sets for literature review
Evaluation mode where density confound must be eliminated entirely
